name: PluresLM Memory
description: Read+write memory capability for OpenClaw backed by a PluresLM service over PluresDB: recall/search/status plus sync() ingest of session transcripts (and an optional configured source directory) via the exclusive memory capability slot.

serviceUrl.description: Preferred PluresLM memory service base URL (for example http://127.0.0.1:38947). When set, OpenClaw tools and memory capability call the service instead of opening the PluresDB store in-process.

dbPath.description: Legacy/direct-mode absolute path to the PluresDB store directory (the folder containing conf/db/blobs/snap.*). Use only when no serviceUrl is available; shared/live stores should be owned by the PluresLM service, not by this adapter. When both serviceUrl and dbPath are omitted, the memory capability stays inert and reports unavailable.

embeddingModel.description: HuggingFace embedding model id used for vector recall.

vectorThreshold.description: Cosine-similarity floor (0-1) for vector recall hits.

maxResults.description: Default maximum number of recall hits to return.

sourceDir.description: Optional absolute path to a directory of memory-doc source files (markdown/text). When set, a force:true sync rescans it and ingests its files as memory-source nodes. When omitted, only session transcripts passed via sessionFiles are ingested.

compressAboveTokens.description: Token floor for native headroom write-path compression. When > 0, a node body whose exact cl100k token count exceeds this value is compacted via native compressText before persistence (logs collapse repeats; prose/code keep head+tail/signatures). The embedding is computed from the ORIGINAL text so recall stays complete regardless of how aggressively the stored body shrinks. 0 or unset = bodies stored verbatim (compression off).

reactivePx.description: Opt-in reactive .px on memory write. When true AND the native binding exposes subscribePx(), the store loads reactivePxPolicy into the native engine and subscribes; delivered post-write constraint violations are surfaced (warn log). Honest post-write observe/report, not a pre-write block. If enabled but the native lacks subscribePx(), the store THROWS at open (C-NOSTUB-001: never advertise a capability that isn't there). Default false.

reactivePxPolicy.description: Absolute path to a .px policy file loaded into the native engine when reactivePx is true. Missing/empty while reactivePx is on is a hard error (enabling reactive .px with no policy is meaningless).
